laws.title: New York Paid Prenatal Leave —*20 Hours Per Year
laws.summary: New York became the first state in the nation to require paid prenatal leave. Employees are entitled to up to 20 hours of paid leave per 52-week period for prenatal medical appointments. This is separate from Paid Family Leave.
compliance_actions: Update leave policy with separate 'Paid Prenatal Leave' category
Allow employees to take 20 hours per pregnancy per 52-week period
Train HR on the new benefit
Update payroll/HRIS system to track separately
